evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Endpoint https://api.lemonsqueezy.com/v1/checkouts with JSON:API payload structure is internally consistent and matches known Lemon Squeezy API conventions. HMAC-SHA256 with X-Signature header is the documented webhook verification. No version claim but methods are self-consistent.
evidence.executability: Backend main.py uses Optional in CheckoutRequest model without importing Optional from typing — will raise NameError. Also imports httpx in main.py via exception handler (httpx.HTTPError) without import statement. Section 5.1 explicitly instructs ngrok http 8000 (sandbox-infeasible). Caps executability at 2.
evidence.completeness: (a) acquisition steps present; (b) install commands present though using >= with npm is unusual; (c) .env.example present with exact names matching code; (d) backend code present; (e) frontend code present; (f) test command present. However TODO placeholders in webhook handler violate explicit constraint of 'no placeholder TODOs'. Caps at 3.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Multiple official docs.lemonsqueezy.com URLs cited (canonical domain). Citations placed inline near steps via [n] references and listed at end. Mix of official and third-party (supastarter, medium, github).

rubric_notes: TODO comments in webhook handler directly contradict canonical constraint (c). Missing Optional import and missing httpx import in main.py are extractor-fatal. ngrok in testing section triggers sandbox cap.
